name: Computershare Limited.
analysis: CPU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$37.3500. Trade idea: entry A$37.4250, stop A$35.1054, target A$44.3838 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
